description: Individual UMKM Detail Page - Create a new dashboard page at /dashboard/umkm (using query params for static export) showing detailed profiles for individual UMKM with score breakdown, credit risk, cluster info, recommendations, and nearby competitors. Also add navigation links from the map markers and sidebar.
steps: Step 1: Create `frontend/lib/umkm-detail-data.ts` with ~50 sample UMKM profiles. Each profile should have: id (string, e.g. 'UMKM-001'), nama_usaha (string), jenis_usaha (one of Makanan/Fashion/Kerajinan/Jasa/Pertanian), kecamatan, kabupaten, lat, lng, tahun_berdiri, jumlah_karyawan, omset_bulanan (juta), has_digital_presence, location_score (0-100), location_score_breakdown ({ infrastructure: number, digital: number, financial: number, market: number, risk: number } - percentages summing context of the score), credit_risk_band (one of AAA/AA/A/BBB/BB/B/CCC), probability_of_default (0-100%), cluster_name (one of the 5 cluster names from static-data.ts), recommendations (string[] with 3-4 actionable items), nearby_competitors (number). Generate diverse data across all kabupaten, business types, and risk levels. Export as `umkmDetailData` array and `umkmDetailMap` (Record keyed by id).

Step 2: Create the page file at `frontend/app/(dashboard)/umkm/page.tsx`. Use 'use client' and Suspense pattern (like the kecamatan page). Accept query param `?id=UMKM-001`. The page displays: (a) Header with nama_usaha and back button, (b) Basic info card (jenis usaha, kecamatan, kabupaten, tahun berdiri, karyawan, omset, digital presence), (c) Location Score card with a horizontal bar chart breakdown showing each factor's contribution (using Recharts BarChart), (d) Credit Risk card showing band, PD, and a color indicator, (e) Cluster membership card showing cluster name and brief description (from knowledge-base.ts clusterSummaries), (f) Recommendations card with bullet list of improvement items, (g) Nearby competitors count. Style consistently with the kecamatan detail page (glass-card, slate-700/800 borders, accent colors).

Step 3: Add 'UMKM Directory' to the Sidebar navigation in `frontend/components/dashboard/Sidebar.tsx`. Add it after 'Location Intelligence' with the Users icon from lucide-react. The href should be '/umkm'.

Step 4: Update `frontend/components/dashboard/MapInner.tsx` to add a link in the Popup for each marker. Below the existing popup content (kecamatan, kabupaten, score), add a small 'Lihat UMKM' link that navigates to `/umkm?id=` with a matching UMKM from umkm-detail-data.ts (match by kecamatan name). If no match found, don't show the link.
Step 5: Verify builds and tests pass. Run `pnpm build` and `pnpm test:ci` in frontend/.
acceptance_criteria: New file frontend/lib/umkm-detail-data.ts exists with ~50 UMKM profiles
New page at frontend/app/(dashboard)/umkm/page.tsx renders UMKM detail when ?id= param provided
Sidebar shows 'UMKM Directory' navigation item linking to /umkm
Map popups include a link to the UMKM detail page when a matching UMKM exists
verification: Run `pnpm build` in frontend/ directory and confirm /umkm route appears in the output
Run `pnpm test:ci` in frontend/ directory and confirm all tests pass
